code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(l)
  l
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut result = ""
mut start = 0
mut i = 0
mut first = true

while i <= n
  mut is_ws = false
  if i == n
    is_ws = true
  else
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        is_ws = true
      end
    when None
      is_ws = true
    end
  end

  if is_ws
    if start < i
      let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(x)
        let sq = x * x
        if first
          result = "#{sq}"
          first = false
        else
          result = "#{result} #{sq}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    start = i + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println(result)
